items.name: accept
items.signature: public func accept(sockfd: Int32, addr: Pointer[UInt8], addrlen: Pointer[Int32]) -> Int32
items.doc:
Accepts a connection. Returns new fd or -1 on error.
Pass null pointers to ignore client address.

items.name: bind
items.signature: public func bind(sockfd: Int32, addr: Pointer[UInt8], addrlen: Int32) -> Int32
items.doc: Binds a socket to an address. Returns 0 on success, -1 on error.

items.name: close
items.doc: Closes a file descriptor. Returns 0 on success, -1 on error.

items.name: connect
items.signature: public func connect(sockfd: Int32, addr: Pointer[UInt8], addrlen: Int32) -> Int32
items.doc: Connects a socket to a remote address. Returns 0 on success, -1 on error.

items.name: freeaddrinfo
items.doc: Frees the addrinfo linked list returned by getaddrinfo().

items.name: getaddrinfo
items.signature: public func getaddrinfo(node: Pointer[UInt8], service: Pointer[UInt8], hints: Pointer[UInt8], res: Pointer[Pointer[UInt8]]) -> Int32
items.doc:
Resolves a hostname to socket addresses.
Returns 0 on success, non-zero error code on failure.
The result pointer must be freed with freeaddrinfo().

addrinfo struct layout (macOS, 48 bytes):
  offset 0:  ai_flags    (i32)
  offset 4:  ai_family   (i32)
  offset 8:  ai_socktype (i32)
  offset 12: ai_protocol (i32)
  offset 16: ai_addrlen  (u32)
  offset 20: padding     (4 bytes on macOS, differs from Linux)
  offset 24: ai_canonname (ptr)
  offset 32: ai_addr     (ptr)
  offset 40: ai_next     (ptr)

items.name: htons
items.doc: Converts host byte order to network byte order (16-bit).

items.name: listen
items.signature: public func listen(sockfd: Int32, backlog: Int32) -> Int32
items.doc: Listens for connections. Returns 0 on success, -1 on error.

items.name: recv
items.signature: public func recv(sockfd: Int32, buf: Pointer[UInt8], len: Int64, flags: Int32) -> Int64
items.doc: Receives data from a socket. Returns bytes read, 0 on close, -1 on error.

items.name: send
items.signature: public func send(sockfd: Int32, buf: Pointer[UInt8], len: Int64, flags: Int32) -> Int64
items.doc: Sends data on a socket. Returns bytes sent or -1 on error.

items.name: setsockopt
items.signature: public func setsockopt(sockfd: Int32, level: Int32, optname: Int32, optval: Pointer[UInt8], optlen: Int32) -> Int32
items.doc: Sets a socket option. Returns 0 on success, -1 on error.

items.name: socket
items.signature: public func socket(domain: Int32, type_: Int32, proto: Int32) -> Int32
items.doc: Creates a socket. Returns fd or -1 on error.
